IonriftWaterline.SettingsEnableTokenWake: When enabled, tokens moving through Ionrift water regions emit expanding ring ripples on your client.
IonriftWaterline.SettingsRippleTuningHin: Fine-tune ripple lifetime, radius, variance, and shader parameters. Client-local; safe to adjust mid-session.
IonriftWaterline.SettingsDebugHint: Enable verbose console logging for water and ripple state. Useful for troubleshooting; can be chatty in combat.
IonriftWaterline.WakeTuningHint: Client-only ripple tuning. Shader / Sprites / Both = how you preview the effect.
IonriftWaterline.WakeTuningPresetSave: Save current settings as a new preset
